title: Debug Screen Option Profiles
description: Adds the ability to save debug screen settings presets (F3)
body: ## Debug Screen Option Profiles The "Debug Screen Option Profiles" mod simplifies working with the debug screen. It allows you to save settings and quickly switch between them using profiles. Now you don't need to copy files manually. ![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/593daaa0ab9c3fbbc6a0c42df960fcddb627a065_0.webp) ## Usage To open the profiles menu, press the debug screen hotkey (default: ```F3 + F6```) and select ```Presets``` Here you can create, edit, apply, and delete profiles. Once applied, a profile becomes active by default, and all changes in the main menu will be saved to it. ## Additional * Profiles are stored in the ```config/debug-option-profiles folder```. * When renaming a profile, there are restrictions on existing names and unsupported characters. ## 🤝 Support
